title: aristida junciformis subsp. macilenta
intro: Aristida junciformis subsp. macilenta, also known as aristida grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aristida junciformis subsp. macilenta include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aristida junciformis subsp. macilenta include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various health conditions.
